content.en:
The Five Elements Divine Wheel is the Great Divine Power of the Five Elements, which contains the origin of five attributes.

Therefore, the Five Elements Divine Wheel comes with five attribute abilities, such as the effect of containing the Void Spirit Golden Silk Golden Divine Power, which can burst out to penetrate the enemy, and the effect of containing the Water Sinking Realm Divine Power, which can form the Five Elements Enchantment, forming a special sense of oppression to suppress the enemy.

Of course, the 5 abilities attached to the Five Elements Divine Wheel are just to increase some effects, and the real effect of the Five Elements Divine Wheel is that it can suppress all kinds of magical powers containing the Five Elements.

For example, if other people have cultivated a fire-based divine power, even if they have cultivated this fire-based divine power to the consummation realm, they will not be able to exert any power at all in the face of the Five Elements Divine Wheel.

The Five Elements Divine Wheel can suppress everything, containing the divine powers of the Five Elements, and only the great divine powers of the Five Elements can compete with the Five Elements Divine Wheel.

Now that Ye Tian has practiced the Five Elements Divine Wheel, although he has only just cultivated the Five Elements Divine Wheel, it is infinitely powerful, which has increased Ye Tian's strength a lot.

After the Five Elements God Wheel was trained, Ye Tian once again entered the battle tower of the illusory world, trying to challenge the replica of His Royal Highness of the Eternal Ancient level on the ninth layer of the battle tower.

The result was obvious, even if Ye Tian had cultivated the Five Elements Divine Wheel, although his strength had increased a little, he was still not the opponent of the clone of His Royal Highness of the ninth layer of the Battle Tower.

At this time, Ye Tian was thinking about how to proceed with the next step of cultivation.

Now, his two spatial supernatural powers have been cultivated to the Dacheng realm, and the sword path mastery has also been created, and he has practiced a great supernatural power.

In addition, his Chaos Body Refining Technique had also been cultivated to the fifth layer, and there was no way to reach the sixth layer realm in a short period of time.

"I'm about to reach the limit in many ways, it's not something that I can improve in a short period of time, even if I become a first-grade Eternal Highness, it's extremely difficult, how did those Supreme Highnesses in the history of the human race become the sons of the Supreme Universe?"

Ye Tian thought incredibly.

Could it be that when those supreme-level highnesses were at the emperor level, they had a lifespan of more than 100,000 years like him, and then used a long time to accumulate strength, and finally stepped into the realm of god-level children of the universe?

"It shouldn't be possible, it takes tens of thousands of years or even nearly 100,000 years to impact the realm of the supreme-level universe sub-universe, it's too cost-effective, if you want to become a supreme-level highness, you probably have some special methods, but I don't know it now!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

In this year, Ye Tian has not made much progress, and the fifth layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique has improved a little bit, but it is very far from the fifth layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique's consummation realm.

Ye Tian knew very well that if he wanted to make rapid progress, the time talent was useless at all, even if the time talent could be accelerated by a hundred times and a thousand times, it would be difficult for him to increase his strength significantly.

If you can quickly increase your strength by relying on time, then wouldn't those galaxy-level, galaxy-level, and even cosmic gods who have cultivated for countless years go against the sky to the limit.

There are some areas where progress is not measured by time at all, and if there is no big opportunity, there is no need to improve quickly.

For example, in the fifth-layer realm of the Chaos Refining Body Technique, Ye Tian found that the general chaos resources had no effect on him at all, and even treasures like the Chaos Crystal could only make him cultivate a little faster.

If there were no higher-level Chaos Resources, it would be too difficult for Ye Tian to advance the Chaos Refining Technique to the Fifth Layer Perfection Realm.

This time, the Shentai Divine Lord came to visit, and brought a news that surprised Ye Tian extremely much.

"Your Highness Wanfa, congratulations!"

As soon as the god lord came, he laughed and said.

"Shentai Divine Master, what happened, why do you want to congratulate me?" Ye Tian was full of doubts.

The Divine Lord said: "Your Highness Wanfa, you must also know that your strength has fallen into a bottleneck, and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race is ready to arrange a very powerful existence to serve as your mentor this time to guide your cultivation. You must know that even those highnesses in the Xuan-level region have to pay some price if they want to get the guidance of their mentor, and even only those highnesses at the top of the Xuan-level region are eligible for the guidance of their mentor. In fact, the yellow-level area has not been very valued by the Terran Supreme Palace, and the three Constant-level Highnesses in the yellow-level area have never received guidance before, and this time the Terran Supreme Hall is an exception for you!"

"Shentai Divine Lord, what kind of strength is that mentor?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

All along, he only knew that with a universe-level cultivation talent, he could cultivate to the realm of the cosmic gods.

And his cultivation talent has surpassed the Yu level and reached the Chao level.

How rare the Chaos level cultivation talent was, even it was not recorded in the Yellow Level Regional Inheritance Treasure Pavilion, so Ye Tian did not know what level the realm above the Universe God was.

At this time, the Shentai Divine Lord said with great admiration: "I am the Universe God Realm, and that master's cultivation is above the Universe God, and that realm is called the master by all the universe races! Once you become the master, even in the entire universe, it is enough to become a hegemon, even if our human race has become a universe race, but the number of masters is still very rare. It can be said that every master is the high-level of the Terran race, and they basically sit on one side and maintain the rule of the entire Terran race. Many of the Masters are the heads of the top forces of the Terran Race, and it is very difficult to mobilize a Master, so if you think about it, it is such a great opportunity to mobilize a Master to guide your cultivation!"

"Above the cosmic gods, dominate the realm!"

Ye Tian took a deep breath, full of yearning for this realm, with his current Chaos level cultivation talent, he would eventually be able to reach the Domination realm.

However, if he wants to cultivate to the master realm, he doesn't know how many years it will take, it must be a long time later.

For him now, a master is undoubtedly an unimaginably great powerhouse.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also full of joy.

That mentor is the master realm, then his cultivation talent must have reached the chaos level.

Ye Tian's current cultivation talent is Chaos level, he only needs to copy two more Chaos level cultivation talents, and he can make his cultivation talent transform again.

But how rare the Chaos level cultivation talent is, with his strength and identity, there is no way to contact the Chaos level cultivation talent, but now the Supreme Hall of the Human Race has sent him a mentor, which allows him to copy a Chaos level cultivation talent.

Thinking of this, Ye Tian's heart was extremely excited.

"Tantai Divine Clan, when will that Master Master be able to guide my cultivation?" Ye Tian asked impatiently.

"In half a month, that master will be able to return to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, and he will guide you alone when the time comes! I'm just here to inform you and get you ready! This is a big opportunity, you have to take advantage of it!"

"I know!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, the god of the platform left.

In the blink of an eye, half a month has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian received a notice that the Master Mentor had arrived at the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

Ziya was temporarily promoted to the palace where the master was located.

On the road.

Ziya was extremely excited, she was very excited when she learned that she had taken Ye Tian into the palace of a powerful man above the cosmic god this time.

"Master, you are so powerful that you can let a dominant powerhouse guide you in your cultivation!"

Ziya felt that she could brag about it when she went back, making the other illusory elves in the yellow-level region envious and envious.

After all, Ye Tian is estimated to be the only one in the Yellow Level Region for a long time to let the dominant powerhouse guide, which is a break from convention!

As Ye Tian's housekeeper, she felt extremely honored.

"Ziya, don't be a sycophant, lead the way!"

Ye Tian smiled.

"Good!"

Ziya used her authority to open one space door after another, stepped through one space after another, and finally came to a space in the depths of the supreme hall of the human race.

There is a huge temple here, standing in the void.

And in front of the temple gate, two huge stone figures are guarding.

These two stone men are not real creatures, but a kind of puppet.

But even if they were just puppets, the aura on their bodies was very powerful, making Ye Tiandu feel difficult to move.

"It's definitely a puppet of the Cosmic God Realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Being able to use two puppets of the Cosmic God Realm as gatekeepers shows the strength of this dominant powerhouse.

At this time, the two puppets restrained their breath and remained motionless, as if they were stones.

Then, a voice came: "Come in, your butler can't stay here!"

As soon as the words fell, Ziya was expelled from this space.

Ye Tian walked towards the temple step by step, and soon came to the gate of the temple, the two puppets were obviously instructed, and did not stop Ye Tian, allowing Ye Tian to enter the temple.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the depths of the temple and saw the dominant powerhouse.

This dominant powerhouse was dressed in a pale gray robe, with long hair, which was spread out, his eyes were like stars, and his breath was simple and deep, incomparably mysterious.

"I've seen the Juggernaut!"

Ye Tian said very respectfully.

"My name is Xuanyuan Master, and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race has entrusted me to guide your cultivation, so you can call me Xuanyuan Master in the future. "

Xuanyuan Juggernaut said lightly, his words were very flat, as if there was no emotion, so that people couldn't know what he was thinking in his heart.

"Yes, Mentor Xuanyuan!"

Ye Tianying said.

At this moment, Ye Tian used his copying talent to try to envelop the Xuanyuan Juggernaut.

Although here, the enveloping range of his copying talent was suppressed to an extremely small range, it still succeeded in enveloping the Xuanyuan Juggernaut.

Suddenly, Xuanyuan's talent was presented in front of Ye Tian.
